name: Northwest Vietnam Explorer: 11 Days of Culture & Stunning Landscapes
duration: Places:Hanoi - Sapa - Mu Cang Chai - Mai Chau - Halong Bay
highlights: Experience a private trek through scenic rice terraces and authentic encounters with local hill tribes in Sapa.
Explore Hanoi and have a look at its long-preserved culture, cuisine, and history of more than 1000 years
Soak in the panoramic views of Fansipan, Southeast Asia's highest peak.
Join the overnight cruise through the stunning wonders of Halong Bay.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival - Vespa Motorbike Night Food Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Upon your arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, our tour guide and driver will pick you up and transfer you to your hotel in Hanoi. Check-in and relax in your room after a long flight. NOTE: The normal check-in time will be around 14:00. In case you check in early, an additional charge will be applied. Afternoon/Evening

Meet your guide outside the hotel

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Transfer To Sapa
itinerary.description:
Morning

After having breakfast, around 06:30 to 07:00, you will embark on a 6-hour drive to Sapa, a beautiful and poetic town of the North. Afternoon

Arrive in Sapa town around 13:00 - 14:00. After the check-in process, you can enjoy your free time for the rest of the day. You can relax at the hotel or explore the stunning Sapa town by yourself.

itinerary.title: Sapa Trekking - Muong Hoa Valley - Lao Chai - Ta Van
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Trekking 13 km

Morning

Enjoy breakfast at your hotel. Meet your tour guide and drive to Muong Hoa Valley, around 7 km away from the town center. Drop off once you reach the main road of the valley and begin the trekking tour. Travel through small trails of rock and gravel, which lead to an opening view of the beautiful terrace fields

itinerary.title: Sapa - Silver Waterfall - Mu Cang Chai
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast prepared by your host. Begin the day by visiting the Silver Waterfall, a wild and natural spot for taking pictures. Drive to the "Heaven Gate" of Sapa on Hoang Lien Son Mountain, where you can grasp a panoramic view of Lai Chau Valley and Fansipan Mount from many angles. Have a look at local life while passing by the villages of the Lu people in Binh Lu and the Lao people in Than Thuoc. Afternoon

After lunch, reach Mu Cang Chai in Yen Bai, famous for its gorgeous terrace fields

itinerary.title: Mu Cang Chai Short Trek - Nghia Lo
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, meet your tour guide and trek to the Han Xung village of the H'Mong people. Along the way, you have a great chance to observe the majestic landscape on the way. Stop at La Man Tan to spend your time in the rural area, visiting families and schools there to learn more about ethnic lifestyles. Then, head to Nghia Lo in the southwest of Yen Bai province, via Khau Pha Pass and have lunch along the way. Afternoon

Arrive in Nghia Lo and stay overnight in this tranquil town

itinerary.title: Nghia Lo - Moc Chau - Mai Chau
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast beforehand. Go on a driving trip to Moc Chau Province, which is famous for dairy farms and green tea plantations in the North. Pass by Phu Yen, Bac Yen district of Son La Province. Here, you will learn about the production process of local products here. Continue the trip to Mai Chau and have lunch on your way

itinerary.title: Mai Chau - Hoa Binh - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at your homestay. Take a look at the gorgeous sunrise in the tranquil village. Enjoy your time in the village with a trekking trip. Besides the chance to immerse in the natural atmosphere of the peaceful mountainous, tourists also integrate into the cultural and daily life of Thai people. After lunch, transfer a 4-hour drive back to Hanoi with your private driver

itinerary.title: Hanoi Half-day City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning/ Afternoon (depending on the availability)

Your tour guide will pick you up from your hotel, and be ready for the half-day city tour to explore famous attractions in Hanoi. Begin your trip with a visit to visit the Temple of Literature, Vietnam's very first university dedicated to Confucius. Then, move to witness the unique One Pillar Pagoda - one of the most important pagodas in Hanoi that has a special design like a blooming lotus. Next, pay a visit to the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, the resting place of President Ho Chi Minh, and listen to some interesting stories about the great leader...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 08:00 - 08:30, our driver will pick you up and head to the World Heritage Halong Bay through the highway, which takes about 2.5 hours. Upon arrival at the port, check in and get on a tender to the main ship, and begin your adventure to Halong Bay. Having lunch on board as the cruise travels through the bay. Witness the various islets come from many shapes and sizes, which is the signature scenery of the bay. Afternoon

Participate in amusing activities hosted by the cruise such as swimming, kayaking, cave visiting, etc

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Before your breakfast, you can get up early to join a Tai-chi class or simply admire the stunning view of Halong Bay at sunrise

Join more activities to explore the bay further, including swimming, kayaking, etc. (depending on the cruise’s itinerary). After your water activities, return to the main cruise to check out then have brunch. Arrive at the port and disembark around 11:30 - 12:30. Say goodbye to the crew and get on the shuttle bus to Hanoi

itinerary.title: Hanoi Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast and enjoy the leisure time left in Hanoi. Make sure to check your luggage then check out. NOTE: Check-out time is at noon. Please contact your travel assistant if you want a late checkout. Our driver will take you to Noi Bai Airport for your flight as scheduled

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing except overnight at local homestay or on train
All transport and transfer by air-conditioned vehicle (including airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English-speaking guides.
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
